intro.name: Hung-Yeh Chiang
intro.subtitle: Vincent
paragraphs: My name is HungYeh Chiang, and I hail from NeiHu Senior High School's Computer Science Special Class. This marks the inception of my coding journey. My fascination with coding ignited in 2022 upon delving into the stories of tech visionaries such as Elon Musk and Steve Jobs, who have remained my idols ever since.

Over the past three years, my coding journey has solidified my resolve to pursue Information Science as my field of study. My aspirations lead me to delve deeper into Artificial Intelligence and algorithms, preparing myself for the future landscape of technological advancement.

During my college tenure, I aim to utilize my free time to engage in internships, thereby garnering invaluable practical experience. Additionally, I intend to actively participate in various activities and competitions to further hone my development skills. Moreover, I am keen on enrolling in business-related courses to refine my acumen in business management.

Every endeavor I undertake is geared towards realizing my dream of establishing a tech company that contributes positively to our planet. Post-graduation, should my startup venture flourish, I will dedicate myself to its continuous growth. However, if the timing isn't conducive for my entrepreneurial pursuits, I am inclined to seek employment as a software engineer to glean insights into corporate dynamics and operations.
